summary: Backend API Testing - Iteration 9 COMPLETE. 19/19 tests PASS. All requested endpoints verified working: Auth (register/login/me), Categories (list/follow/unfollow), Health check, Admin community members.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ POST /api/auth/register - Returns access_token and user data correctly
✓ POST /api/auth/login - Returns access_token and user data correctly
✓ GET /api/auth/me - Returns user profile with followed_categories array
✓ POST /api/categories/{id}/follow - Adds category to followed_categories (verified via /api/auth/me)
✓ DELETE /api/categories/{id}/follow - Removes category from followed_categories (verified via /api/auth/me)
✓ GET /api/categories - Returns list of 10 categories with id, name, icon, color
✓ GET /api/admin/communities/{id}/members - Returns {members: [], total: N} (admin only, 403 for regular users)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native app - backend only testing requested)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix 'test_iter9_', 'test_me_', 'test_follow_', 'test_persist_', 'test_regular_'. Test communities created with prefix 'MEMB'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 requested backend endpoints verified working. Key verifications: 1) Auth endpoints return access_token and user data, 2) Category follow/unfollow correctly updates followed_categories in user profile (verified via GET /api/auth/me), 3) Admin community members endpoint returns members list with proper auth checks (401 without auth, 403 for non-admin). Frontend is React Native (Expo) - cannot be tested via browser.

features_verified.auth_register: PASS - POST /api/auth/register returns access_token and user data
features_verified.auth_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns access_token and user data
features_verified.auth_me: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns user profile with followed_categories
features_verified.admin_community_members: PASS - GET /api/admin/communities/{id}/members returns members list (admin only)

notes: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. Frontend testing via Playwright is not possible. The Expo tunnel errors in logs are expected for the preview environment.
